reasoning: In the absence of live search capabilities to observe the LMSYS Chatbot Arena Leaderboard as of late October 2025, the Polymarket estimate of 12% (0.12) as of October 16, 2025, provides the best available aggregation of information. AI labs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI) frequently leapfrog each other, resulting in a base rate of roughly 25-30%. The 12% market price indicates that either another competitor currently holds a strong lead, or there is widespread expectation of competing models maintaining dominance through the end of the year. Additionally, the tie-breaking rule (alphabetical order) structurally disadvantages OpenAI against major competitors like Anthropic and Google. Adjusting slightly for prediction markets' favorite-longshot bias (where low-probability events are often slightly overpriced), a forecast of 11% is the most well-calibrated estimate based on the available data.
